title: rosa × braunii var. belocarpa
intro: Rosa × braunii var. belocarpa, also known as the Rosa × braunii 'Belocarpa', is a hybrid rose plant that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent, which can help to reduce swelling and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Rosa × braunii var. belocarpa include its potential to help with menopausal symptoms, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant, protecting the body from free radicals and oxidative stress. Rosa × braunii var. belocarpa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
